sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89141" key="prosepara/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπ-ᾰράομαι</orth>, <sense id="n89141.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">imprecate besides</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξώλειαν ἑαυτῷ</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0385.tlg001:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
